message:
fix(redis): ACL username support, RESP CRLF sanitization

- redis.rs: parse username:password from Redis URL and use two-arg AUTH
  for Redis 6+ ACL support (MEDIUM)
- redis.rs: strip CR/LF from SimpleString and Error RESP encodings to
  prevent wire protocol frame splitting (LOW)
- WATCH connection-scoping and PubSub ping message loss noted but not
  fixed (architectural — requires connection pinning redesign)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
